steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: Chicago offers a diverse array of artworks that should do something to the tastes of art lovers. The passage indicates these artworks are meant to serve the audience's varied preferences. The blank verb should express fulfilling or satisfying those preferences.

steps.title: Select the word expressing this meaning
steps.content: Satiate means to satisfy completely, which is exactly what diverse artworks would do for people with varied tastes. The other three don't fit: supplant (replace), mitigate (reduce), and venerate (honor) all describe different actions unrelated to fulfilling preferences. That matches choice D — D is correct.
